description: Verso: Memorial(?) list. Dating: likely 13th century. Contains also a few names of women. Every entry is preceded by "bayt"/"house of." The names: Isḥāq al-Ṭabbākh; Makīn b. Mardūkh; Abū l-Riḍā al-Ḥakīm; Abū ʿAlī al-Manāshifī; the female teacher (al-muʿalllima); Fāḍila; Masʿūd; Manṣūr; Mordekhay; Abū l-Faḍl; Mufaḍḍal; Abū l-Munā; Menaḥem; his sister; Abū l-Faraj al-Kohen; Ibrāhīm b. Sulaymān; Rashīd b. al-Ḥakīm; Umm ʿAzīz; Ibrāhīm al-Khayyāṭ; Nāṣīr b. al-ʿAfīf; Abū ʿAlī; Munajjā al-Ṣabbāgh; Yosef al-Kohen; al-Khayyāṭa; al-Jazzār; Umm Budayr.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
